=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan
Orlando, Florida
Hard Rock Live
2003 may 05

Unknown rec. Big drop between cdr.
Very good sound

CD1

1 intro + To Be Alone With You (Bob on piano), 2 I'll Remember You (Bob on piano, Larry on pedal steel), 3 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on acoustic guitar), 4 I'll Be Your Baby Tonight (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 5 Things Have Changed (Bob on piano), 6 Just Like A Woman (Bob on piano and harp, Larry on pedal steel), 7 The Wicked Messenger (Bob on electric guitar and harp), 8 It's All Over Now, Baby Blue (acoustic) (Larry on pedal steel), 9 High Water (For Charley Patton) (Bob on piano),

CD2

1 Highway 61 Revisited (Bob on piano), 2 Make You Feel My Love (Bob on piano), 3 Honest With Me (Bob on piano, Larry on slide guitar), 4 Bye And Bye (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 5 Summer Days (Bob on piano, Tony on standup bass), 6 (encore), Like A Rolling Stone (Bob on piano), 7 All Along The Watchtower (Bob on piano) 


Concert # 1514 of The Never-Ending Tour. Concert # 13 of the 2003 US Spring Tour. 2003 concert # 24.
Concert # 13 with the 16th Never-Ending Tour Band: Bob Dylan (vocal), Freddie Koella (guitar), Larry Campbell (guitar, mandolin, pedal steel guitar & electric slide guitar), Tony Garnier (bass), George Recile (drums & percussion).

1-6, 9-16 Bob Dylan (piano).
8 acoustic with the band.
2, 4, 6, 8 Larry Campbell (pedal steel guitar).
3, 4, 6, 7 Bob Dylan (harmonica).
7, 8 Bob Dylan (guitar).
12 Larry Campbell (slide guitar).
